chapters.title: Brandon Sanderson - Mistborn 04 - The Alloy of Law

title: Brandon Sanderson - Mistborn 04 - The Alloy of Law
description: Three hundred years after the events of the Mistborn trilogy, Scadrial is now on the verge of modernity, with railroads to supplement the canals, electric lighting in the streets and the homes of the wealthy, and the first steel-framed skyscrapers racing
